            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "export const ProxyChain = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 554
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 555,
            "text": "        {proxyChain.length === 0 ? ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 556,
            "text": "          \u003cBox"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557,
            "text": "            sx={{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 558,
            "text": "              display: \"flex\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 559,
            "text": "              alignItems: \"center\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 560,
            "text": "              justifyContent: \"center\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 561,
            "text": "              height: \"100%\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 562,
            "text": "              color: theme.palette.text.secondary,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 563,
            "text": "            }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 564,
            "text": "          \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 565,
            "text": "            \u003cTypography\u003e{t(\"proxies.page.chain.empty\")}\u003c/Typography\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 566,
            "text": "          \u003c/Box\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567,
            "text": "        ) : ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568,
            "text": "          \u003cDndContext"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "            sensors={sensors}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570,
            "text": "            collisionDetection={closestCenter}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 571,
            "text": "            onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572,
            "text": "          \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 573,
            "text": "            \u003cSortableContext"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574,
            "text": "              items={proxyChain.map((proxy) =\u003e proxy.id)}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 575,
            "text": "              strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 576,
            "text": "            \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577,
            "text": "              \u003cBox"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 578,
            "text": "                sx={{"
          },

            "lineNumber": 579,
            "text": "                  borderRadius: 1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 580,
            "text": "                  minHeight: 60,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 581,
            "text": "                  p: 1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582,
            "text": "                }}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 583,
            "text": "              \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 584,
            "text": "                {proxyChain.map((proxy, index) =\u003e ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 585,
            "text": "                  \u003cSortableItem"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 586,
            "text": "                    key={proxy.id}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 587,
            "text": "                    proxy={proxy}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 588,
            "text": "                    index={index}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 589,
            "text": "                    onRemove={handleRemoveProxy}"

          {
            "lineNumber": 590,
            "text": "                  /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 591,
            "text": "                ))}"
          },

            "text": "              \u003c/Box\u003e"

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.component"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import android.view.View"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import android.view.ViewGroup"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import androidx.recyclerview.widget.GridLayoutManager"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import com.github.kr328.clash.design.view.VerticalScrollableHost"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "class ProxyPageFactory(private val config: ProxyViewConfig) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    class Holder("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        val recyclerView: RecyclerView,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        val root: View,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    ) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(root)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    private val childrenPool = RecyclerView.RecycledViewPool()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    fun newInstance(): Holder {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        val root = VerticalScrollableHost(config.context).apply {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "            layoutParams = ViewGroup.LayoutParams("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "                ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "                ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        val recyclerView = RecyclerView(config.context).apply {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            layoutParams = ViewGroup.LayoutParams("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "                ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "                ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        root.addView(recyclerView)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        recyclerView.apply {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "            layoutManager = GridLayoutManager(config.context, 6).apply {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "                spanSizeLookup = object : GridLayoutManager.SpanSizeLookup() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "                    override fun getSpanSize(position: Int): Int {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "                        val grids = when (config.proxyLine) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "                            1 -\u003e 6"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "                            2 -\u003e 3"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "                            3 -\u003e 2"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "                            else -\u003e 2"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "                        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "                        return grids"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "                    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "                }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "            setRecycledViewPool(childrenPool)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "            clipToPadding = false"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "        return Holder(recyclerView, root).apply {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "            root.tag = this"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    fun fromRoot(root: View): Holder {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        return root.tag!! as Holder"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],

Each cell includes layout padding that insets it from the edges. The user requested adding top padding to the scroll view equivalent to the existing item spacing. The scrollable area is the inner RecyclerView within each ViewPager page. The recommended solution is to modify `bindInsets` in ProxyPageAdapter by adding `R.dimen.proxy_layout_padding` (or double it) to achieve symmetry. This aligns with the existing spacing of 3dp between proxy items.</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I see a potential bug in ProxyDesign. The `topInset` calculation is missing contributions from `timeout_scroll_view`, `concurrency_scroll_view`, `tab_layout`, and `activity_bar` components. The user intends to add extra top padding specifically to the inner RecyclerView, not the entire view. While `ProxyPageAdapter` already handles insets for toolbar, timeout, concurrency, and tab elements, it excludes the mode scroll and ads scroll views, which are managed by the `pagesView`. The `setPadding` in `ProxyDesign` only accounts for `mode` and `ads` components, excluding `timeout`, `concurrency`, `tab`, and `toolbar` contributions. 

The layout uses a `CoordinatorLayout` with `ViewPager2` set to `match_parent` and `LinearLayout` with `wrap_content` on top, meaning they overlap rather than push each other. The `pagesView.setPadding(topInset)` pushes the `ViewPager2`'s child content downward, but this padding calculation appears incomplete since it doesn't include all relevant UI components.

- Missing contributions from: `timeout_scroll_view`, `concurrency_scroll_view`, `tab_layout`, and `activity_bar`
- `ProxyPageAdapter` already handles insets for: `toolbar`, `timeout`, `concurrency`, and `tab` elements
- Excludes: `mode_scroll` and `ads_scroll` views, which are managed by `pagesView` The padding calculation in `ProxyDesign` only includes `mode` and `ads` heights, but the total overlay height should encompass `activityBar`, `mode`, `timeout`, `ads`, `concurrency`, `tab`, and `elevation`. The missing components`timeout`, `concurrency`, `tab`, and `toolbar`are not accounted for in the padding, suggesting a bug. When `post` runs, all views should be laid out, yet the padding logic still omits these critical height contributions. The toolbar height is not included in `topInset` because the actual toolbar resides in the overlay, which is separate from the ViewPager's coordinate system. The ViewPager does not account for the toolbar in its layout, as the overlay covers it.

The flow works as follows:
- ViewPager2 occupies the full screen.
- `pagesView.setPadding(topInset)` applies padding using only `mode` and `ads` values, pushing the ViewPagers inner RecyclerView downward.
- Each page's inner RecyclerView uses `bindInsets` that include `surface.insets.top`, `toolbar`, `timeout`, `concurrency`, and `tab` values.

This may lead to double counting: `surface.insets.top` accounts for the status bar, while `bindInsets` adds fixed dimensions for various UI bars.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

代理列表由 `ViewPager2` 内每页的 `RecyclerView` 承载；顶部内边距通过 `bindInsets` 设置。卡片之间的视觉间距来自 `proxy_layout_padding`（3dp）。我们将在 `bindInsets` 的 `top` 中加上该值。

## 修改说明

代理节点列表不是 `ScrollView`，而是每页里的 **`RecyclerView`**。列表与顶栏之间的留白由 `bindInsets` 里的 `top` 控制。

已在 `ProxyPageAdapter` 里在原有 `top`（工具栏 + 超时条 + 并发条 + Tab 高度）基础上，再增加 **`@dimen/proxy_layout_padding`（3dp）**，与 `ProxyView` 里卡片之间的 **`layoutPadding`** 一致，这样 Tab 下方到第一行节点的空隙会和网格里节点之间的间距同一量级。

```64:76:c:/Users/Ken-Narmal/Desktop/ClashMetaForAndroid/design/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/design/adapter/ProxyPageAdapter.kt
        val toolbarHeight = config.context.getPixels(R.dimen.toolbar_height)
        val tabHeight = config.context.getPixels(R.dimen.tab_layout_height)
        val timeoutBarHeight = config.context.getPixels(R.dimen.delay_timeout_bar_height)
        val concurrencyBarHeight = config.context.getPixels(R.dimen.delay_concurrency_bar_height)
        val listTopGap = config.context.getPixels(R.dimen.proxy_layout_padding)

        holder.recyclerView.bindInsets(
            surface,
            toolbarHeight + timeoutBarHeight + concurrencyBarHeight + tabHeight + listTopGap,
        )
```

若你希望再大一点，只要把 `dimens.xml` 里的 `proxy_layout_padding` 调大，或单独加一个例如 `proxy_list_padding_top` 的 dimen 并在这里引用即可。
